allow: PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; foreach \($f in @\('kleine-gruppe.png','bezugsperson.png','feder.png','sparschwein.png'\)\) { $p = "C:\\Visual Studio Code\\dresdner-tageseltern.de\\public\\images\\icons\\$f"; $img = [System.Drawing.Image]::FromFile\($p\); "{0}: format={1}" -f $f, $img.PixelFormat; $img.Dispose\(\) })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; "Port 3000: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { "Port 3000 FAIL: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" }; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3001" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; "Port 3001: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { "Port 3001 FAIL: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell($src = Get-FileHash 'C:\\Visual Studio Code\\dresdner-tageseltern.de\\Fotos\\ruhige atmosphäre2.png'; $dst = Get-FileHash 'C:\\Visual Studio Code\\dresdner-tageseltern.de\\public\\images\\allgemein\\ruhige-atmosphaere.png'; "SRC: $\($src.Hash\)"; "DST: $\($dst.Hash\)"; "Match: $\($src.Hash -eq $dst.Hash\)")

PowerShell(if \(-not \(Test-Path "public\\images\\pins"\)\) { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path "public\\images\\pins" | Out-Null }; Copy-Item "Fotos\\Malwinapin.png" "public\\images\\pins\\malwina.png"; Copy-Item "Fotos\\outlawpin.png" "public\\images\\pins\\outlaw.png"; Copy-Item "Fotos\\Kinderlandpin.png" "public\\images\\pins\\kinderland.png"; Get-ChildItem "public\\images\\pins")

PowerShell($pid = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1 -ExpandProperty OwningProcess; if \($pid\) { Stop-Process -Id $pid -Force; "Stopped $pid" } else { "Nothing running on 3000" })

PowerShell($port_pid = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1 -ExpandProperty OwningProcess; if \($port_pid\) { Stop-Process -Id $port_pid -Force; "Stopped $port_pid" } else { "Nothing running on 3000" })

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique | ForEach-Object { try { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction Stop } catch {} }; "ok")
PowerShell(Get-Process node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, ProcessName, @{N='RAM_MB';E={[math]::Round\($_.WorkingSet64/1MB,0\)}}, StartTime | Sort-Object RAM_MB -Descending)

PowerShell($nodes = @\(Get-Process node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\); "Node-Prozesse: $\($nodes.Count\)"; if \($nodes.Count -gt 0\) { $nodes | Select-Object Id, @{N='RAM_MB';E={[math]::Round\($_.WorkingSet64/1MB,0\)}}, StartTime | Format-Table })
PowerShell($os = Get-CimInstance Win32_OperatingSystem; "Total RAM: $\([math]::Round\($os.TotalVisibleMemorySize/1MB,1\)\) GB"; "Free RAM:  $\([math]::Round\($os.FreePhysicalMemory/1MB,1\)\) GB")
PowerShell(Stop-Process -Name node -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $remaining = @\(Get-Process node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Count; "Node-Prozesse nach Kill: $remaining")

PowerShell($nodes = @\(Get-Process node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\); "Node-Prozesse: $\($nodes.Count\)"; $os = Get-CimInstance Win32_OperatingSystem; "Free RAM: $\([math]::Round\($os.FreePhysicalMemory/1MB,1\)\) GB")
PowerShell(Stop-Process -Name node -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $os = Get-CimInstance Win32_OperatingSystem; "Frei: $\([math]::Round\($os.FreePhysicalMemory/1MB,1\)\) GB")

PowerShell(Stop-Process -Name node -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $os = Get-CimInstance Win32_OperatingSystem; $free = [math]::Round\($os.FreePhysicalMemory/1MB,1\); "Node-Prozesse weg. Freier RAM: $free GB"; if \($free -lt 3\) { "WARNUNG: weniger als 3 GB frei - Dev-Modus kann crashen" })

PowerShell($conns = Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -LocalPort 3000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conns\) { $conns | ForEach-Object { $p = Get-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "Port 3000 -> PID $\($_.OwningProcess\) \($\($p.ProcessName\)\)" } } else { "Port 3000 ist frei - kein Server laeuft" })
